next_steps: Perform serologic testing for Trypanosoma cruzi antibodies (two different assays)
Refer for primary prevention implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) placement
Long-term ambulatory ECG monitoring to screen for advanced conduction abnormalities
Genetic counseling and testing for hereditary cardiomyopathy
Continue GDMT and secondary stroke prevention with apixaban
Monitor for recurrence of gastrointestinal bleeding
